feature_designs.name: last_mean_delta_all
feature_designs.description: Last valid snapshot, masked mean and last-minus-first delta for every scaled tabular feature, plus length and valid_step_ratio.

feature_designs.name: last_mean_delta_no_prior_scores
feature_designs.description: Same design after removing upstream model score columns.

feature_designs.name: last_mean_delta_no_prior_no_clock
feature_designs.description: Removes upstream score columns and direct clock/context columns.

downside: low quantile or conservative lower-confidence proxy for y_last_cost1p0

default_implementation.reason: lightgbm, catboost and xgboost are not installed in the current environment.

approval_note: This contract can authorize a short training run, but current-corpus results remain diagnostic and cannot approve profitability.
